project_type: Node.js distributed task queue engine (monorepo with shared/, server/, worker/)
build_system: npm workspaces. Build order: shared -> server -> worker. Root package.json orchestrates via npm run build.
test_framework: Vitest with globals enabled, 15s timeout. Tests in /tests/ directory at root. Uses ioredis-mock for Redis, manual mock pg Pool for Postgres.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'npm run build' (builds all workspaces in order). 2. Run 'npm test' (vitest run). All tests must pass.
setup_instructions: Already cloned and built. Install new deps with --workspace flag, e.g. 'npm install cron-parser --workspace @nexusqueue/worker'
environment_constraints: No persistent background services (no real Redis/Postgres). Tests must use ioredis-mock and mock pg Pool. ioredis-mock does NOT support BLMOVE or Lua EVAL/EVALSHA. ioredis-mock DOES support ZADD, ZRANGEBYSCORE, ZREM, LPUSH, RPOP, etc. Rate limiter Lua script must be tested at function level, not via eval. Strict TypeScript: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes.
contribution_requirements: ESM modules with 'type: module'. All imports use .js extension. Follow existing patterns for Redis keys (centralized in shared/src/keys.ts), Postgres DAO functions (shared/src/db.ts), types (shared/src/types.ts).
key_patterns: Producer enqueues via MULTI (SADD + HSET + LPUSH). Worker uses BLMOVE for at-least-once delivery. Retry uses setTimeout + re-LPUSH (to be replaced with delayed sorted set). handleFailure checks attempts vs maxAttempts. Tests access private methods via (worker as any).processOne(). Mock pool captures queries array for assertions.
directory_structure: shared/ = types, Redis keys, DB functions, Redis/PG client factories. server/ = Express REST API + Producer class. worker/ = Worker class + handler registry. tests/ = Vitest test files. infra/postgres/ = SQL migrations. examples/ = smoke test script.
